title: Need to update Rootless Shortcomings doc
body: We've gone a long way to remedying some of what's mentioned in there - `/etc/subuid` and `/etc/subgid` can be experimentally worked around, CGroups V2 is supported via `crun`, etc.

comments.body: This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
#4415 has been merged, so I am closing the issue.
